name: Spiced Almonds
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup firmly packed dark brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 300 degrees.
2. In a small bowl, combine the brown sugar and cinnamon. Set aside.
3. In a medium-sized bowl, whisk the egg white until frothy. Stir in the vanilla extract, almonds, and reserved brown sugar mixture.
4. Spread the almonds in a single layer on a baking sheet.
5. Bake for 10 minutes, then stir the almonds and bake for another 20 minutes total, or until they are dry.
6. Spiced almonds will last at least a week if stored in an airtight container at room temperature.
Yield: 4 1/2 cup
